import os
from dotenv import load_dotenv
from playhouse.postgres_ext import PostgresqlExtDatabase
from services.database import db_proxy
load_dotenv()
db = PostgresqlExtDatabase(os.getenv('POSTGRES_DB') or os.getenv('DATABASE_NAME', 'vector'), host=os.getenv('POSTGRES_HOST') or os.getenv('DATABASE_HOST', 'localhost'), port=int(os.getenv('POSTGRES_PORT') or os.getenv('DATABASE_PORT', 5432)), user=os.getenv('POSTGRES_USER') or os.getenv('DATABASE_USERNAME', 'vector'), password=os.getenv('POSTGRES_PASSWORD') or os.getenv('DATABASE_PASSWORD', 'vector'))
db_proxy.initialize(db)
db.connect()
